LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HOLLIDAY DEVELOPMENT LLC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHES THE RIGHT TO THE REQUESTED RELIEF NOTWITHSTANDING THE CITED MINOR DEFECTS IN ITS APPLICATION. PLAINTIFF TO POST A $10,000 UNDERTAKING. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HOLLIDAY DEVELOPMENT LLC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER

Plaintiff's writ of attachment is granted. Plaintiff establishes the right to the requested relief notwithstanding the cited minor defects in its application. Plaintiff to post a $10,000 undertaking. The court will execute the provided judicial council form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
